item.title: GAME DOMAIN [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME DOMAIN [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME DOMAIN
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow: Elevate Your Gaming Experience
The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements

GAME DOMAIN caters to a wide range of popular games, providing dedicated kernel tweaks to optimize your gaming sessions. Here are the 23 game-specific kernel tweaks that have been meticulously added:

1. PUBG Mobile (PUBGM)
2. Call of Duty: Mobile (CODM)
3. Genshin Impact
4. Free Fire
5. Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
6. Asphalt 9: Legends
7. Apex Legends Mobile
8. Arena of Valor
9. Critical Ops
10. Dead by Daylight Mobile
11. Mobile Legends: Adventure
12. Black Desert Mobile
13. Injustice 2
14. World War Heroes: WW2 FPS
15. Star Wars: Force Arena
16. Shadowgun Legends
17. Standoff 2
18. Battle Prime
19. Super Mecha Champions
20. Free Fire Max
21. PUBG Mobile Lite
22. Call of Duty: Warzone
23. Tanks A Lot! - Realtime Multiplayer Battle Arena
24. F1 Mobile Racing
25. Real Racing
26. BGMI (Battlegrounds Mobile India)
27. Arena Breakout
28. Minecraft
29. CARxSTREET
30. Diablo Immortal

GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.
[read more]

item.title: Data Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: macdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Mac
(Utilities)
Efficient data recovery program for Macintosh is readable only thus tool does not overwrite on your valuable media files. Mac data recovery tool restores all lost digital images, mp3/mp4 files and video clippings in just few clicks on mouse button.
[read more]
item.description:
Data Recovery Mac
(Utilities)
Efficient data recovery program for Macintosh is readable only thus tool does not overwrite on your valuable media files. Mac data recovery tool restores all lost digital images, mp3/mp4 files and video clippings in just few clicks on mouse button.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Data Recovery Mac
(Utilities)
Efficient data recovery program for Macintosh is readable only thus tool does not overwrite on your valuable media files. Mac data recovery tool restores all lost digital images, mp3/mp4 files and video clippings in just few clicks on mouse button.

item.title: 001Micron Digital Camera Data Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: 001Micron Digital Camera Data Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
001Micron Digital Camera Data Undelete
(Utilities)
Digital camera data recovery software is safe, easy to use, non destructive and read only utility can read all the unreadable and inaccessible digital camera files containing important favorite images, pictures, photos, snaps, audio video clips, movies clips etc and restore them to desired place. Professional digital camera data recovery utility rescue corrupted or formatted secure digital sD xD pictures, JPG, JPEG, compact flash multimedia mmc photos, AVI, RIFF, TIFF etc. Digital camera data unformat tool retrieves damaged images, GIF, BMP from removable cards after accidental deletion, media corruption or digital media format. Digital camera snapshots recovery software support retrieval of photographs, MPEG, MPG, MOV, PNG from memory card under windows operating system including Windows 11,Win 10,Win 8 and other. Digital camera data restore software can retrieve deleted picture files even after digital camera reset operation has been performed. Digital camera data salvage software helps to restore erased pictures even if media is corrupted and you can not access it or the memory card being pulled out while camera was on. Digital camera data recovery utility allows to restores all the encrypted and compressed photo files format stored in your digital camera. Features: * Software takes least turn around time to restore deleted photos from all digital cameras. * Software provides easy help manual to understand the working of software. * Support recovery of all major photo files format including JPG, JPEG, MPG, TIFF, RIFF, MPEG, AVI, BMP, MOV, PNG, WAV, GIF and raw file format. * Digital camera data recovery software can restore data deleted from virus infected disk drive.

[read more]
item.description:
001Micron Digital Camera Data Undelete
(Utilities)
Digital camera data recovery software is safe, easy to use, non destructive and read only utility can read all the unreadable and inaccessible digital camera files containing important favorite images, pictures, photos, snaps, audio video clips, movies clips etc and restore them to desired place. Digital camera data recovery utility allows to restores all the encrypted and compressed photo files format stored in your digital camera. Features: * Software takes least turn around time to restore deleted photos from all digital cameras. * Software provides easy help manual to understand the working of software. * Support recovery of all major photo files format including JPG, JPEG, MPG, TIFF, RIFF, MPEG, AVI, BMP, MOV, PNG, WAV, GIF and raw file format. * Digital camera data recovery software can restore data deleted from virus infected disk drive.

[read more]

item.title: Site Monitoring Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Site Monitoring Software [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
Site Monitoring Software
(Internet Apps)
Automatic website monitor tool tracks complete activity of all the websites regularly, constantly that is working properly or not by checking uptime, downtime, low bandwidth, connection failure etc. Website monitor alert software gives a report back to the user about the status of the websites through emails or via beep sounds. Web Site Performance tools checks performance of the website constantly and informs to the user about the performance of the website. Web server monitor keeps track performance and status running on different server protocols like HTTP, SMTP, HTTPS, POP3 and FTP. Website network monitoring software monitors the site by running a specific program when the site is not accessible, connection failure, low network connectivity status, connection not set up, low bandwidth, downtime, uptime and gives back a beep sound or an alert via mail to the user about performance of the websites. URL monitoring software tracks complete performance of the website and gives a report back. Website availability checker software is very easy to use and operate even for novice as well as technical user. Web site performance monitoring software contains user manuals and guide for the help, support and convenience of the user. Website performance checker software supports windows operating system like windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.Features:*Website status checker software monitors website performance constantly and regularly.*Website monitoring service tool sends an alert via beep sound or via an email to the user.*Automatic website monitor software supports windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7.*Website performance analyzer utility supports different types of internet server protocols including HTTP, HTTPS, SMTP, POP3 and FTP.

[read more]
item.description:
Site Monitoring Software
(Internet Apps)
Automatic website monitor tool tracks complete activity of all the websites regularly, constantly that is working properly or not by checking uptime, downtime, low bandwidth, connection failure etc. Website monitor alert software gives a report back to the user about the status of the websites through emails or via beep sounds. [read more]

item.title: Zombies Boom Mod APK 1.3 Unlimited Money and Gems Download [Arcade]
item.itunes:title: Zombies Boom Mod APK 1.3 Unlimited Money and Gems Download [Arcade]
item.itunes:author: jamekling2
item.itunes:summary:
Zombies Boom Mod APK 1.3 Unlimited Money and Gems Download
(Arcade)
Customize your phone's sound profile with Ringtone Mod APK. Access a wide range of ringtones, notification sounds, and alarm tones to personalize your device. Download now!
Introduction
Personalizing your phone's sound profile adds a unique touch to your device and reflects your personality. With Ringtone Mod APK, you can take customization to the next level by accessing a plethora of ringtones, notification sounds, and alarm tones. This guide dives into the features, benefits, and installation process of Ringtone Mod APK.

Understanding Ringtone Mod APK
What is Ringtone Mod APK?
Ringtone Mod APK is a versatile application that allows users to customize their phone's sound profile. From classic melodies to modern tunes, this app offers a vast collection of ringtones, notification sounds, and alarm tones to suit every preference.

Key Features of Ringtone Mod APK
Discover the key features of Ringtone Mod APK, including:

Extensive Library: Access a diverse library of ringtones, notification sounds, and alarm tones.
Customization Options: Personalize your phone's sound profile with ease, choosing from various categories and genres.
Preview Functionality: Listen to each tone before setting it as your default ringtone, notification sound, or alarm tone.
Easy Integration: Seamlessly integrate new tones into your device's sound settings for quick access.
[read more]

item.title: Mac Data Recover for USB [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Data Recover for USB [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: macdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Data Recover for USB
(Utilities)
Professionally develop www.datarecoverymac.us provides reliable and secure Mac Data Recover for USB program to revive deleted pictures, videos, text files and folders from accidentally formatted USB data storage device. Mac file repairing utility provides facility to recover all type of deleted data by using advance scanning technique in easy way. Mac data restoration tool supports all major brands of USB digital media brands like Samsung, Sony, Kingston, HP etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Mac Data Recover for USB

Mac data restoration tool supports all major brands of USB digital media brands like Samsung, Sony, Kingston, HP etc.

[read more]

item.title: Removable Media Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Removable Media Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdatafile
item.itunes:summary:
Removable Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Removable disk data undelete program supports recovery of all damaged office documents (ppt, xls, doc etc), songs and folders from inaccessible or undetected USB removable media drive. Professional removable media file recovery software retrieves missing images (such as jpg, jpeg, bmp) from Micro sD card. Removable storage media data restoration utility to retrieve all deleted files including database, excel sheets, word, power point, html web files etc. External storage media data retrieval tool supports all windows OS such as Windows 11, Win 10, Win 8. Removable disk file restoration program retrieves erased pictures, video clips and files like (mov, avi, mpeg) from damaged iPod, zip drive and other external storage drives. Removable media recovery software rescues corrupted photos, missing snapshots due to improper usage of external storage devices. Features: * Advanced removable disk drive retrieval utility does not require any technical knowledge or training to operate software because it provides highly interactive graphical user interface. * Professional smart media file restoration tool is easy to use and helps to recover erased data due to virus attack, software failure or hardware malfunctions. * External storage media data rescue program easily retrieves lost data from different brands of (like Sony, Samsung, Transcend, Kingston etc) media drives in all capacities 16 GB, 32 GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 512 GB etc. * Removable media data recovery software supports all types of portable storage media including multimedia memory card, smart media, compact flash memory card, sD card, pen drive, memory stick and other external USB storage disk devices.

[read more]
item.description:
Removable Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Removable disk data undelete program supports recovery of all damaged office documents (ppt, xls, doc etc), songs and folders from inaccessible or undetected USB removable media drive. Professional removable media file recovery software retrieves missing images (such as jpg, jpeg, bmp) from Micro sD card. Removable storage media data restoration utility to retrieve all deleted files including database, excel sheets, word, power point, html web files etc. External storage media data retrieval tool supports all windows OS such as Windows 11, Win 10, Win 8. Removable disk file restoration program retrieves erased pictures, video clips and files like (mov, avi, mpeg) from damaged iPod, zip drive and other external storage drives. Removable media recovery software rescues corrupted photos, missing snapshots due to improper usage of external storage devices. Features: * Advanced removable disk drive retrieval utility does not require any technical knowledge or training to operate software because it provides highly interactive graphical user interface. * Professional smart media file restoration tool is easy to use and helps to recover erased data due to virus attack, software failure or hardware malfunctions. * External storage media data rescue program easily retrieves lost data from different brands of (like Sony, Samsung, Transcend, Kingston etc) media drives in all capacities 16 GB, 32 GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 512 GB etc. * Removable media data recovery software supports all types of portable storage media including multimedia memory card, smart media, compact flash memory card, sD card, pen drive, memory stick and other external USB storage disk devices.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Removable Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Removable disk data undelete program supports recovery of all damaged office documents (ppt, xls, doc etc), songs and folders from inaccessible or undetected USB removable media drive. Professional removable media file recovery software retrieves missing images (such as jpg, jpeg, bmp) from Micro sD card. Removable storage media data restoration utility to retrieve all deleted files including database, excel sheets, word, power point, html web files etc. External storage media data retrieval tool supports all windows OS such as Windows 11, Win 10, Win 8. Removable disk file restoration program retrieves erased pictures, video clips and files like (mov, avi, mpeg) from damaged iPod, zip drive and other external storage drives. Removable media recovery software rescues corrupted photos, missing snapshots due to improper usage of external storage devices. Features: * Advanced removable disk drive retrieval utility does not require any technical knowledge or training to operate software because it provides highly interactive graphical user interface. * Professional smart media file restoration tool is easy to use and helps to recover erased data due to virus attack, software failure or hardware malfunctions. * External storage media data rescue program easily retrieves lost data from different brands of (like Sony, Samsung, Transcend, Kingston etc) media drives in all capacities 16 GB, 32 GB, 64 GB, 128 GB, 512 GB etc. * Removable media data recovery software supports all types of portable storage media including multimedia memory card, smart media, compact flash memory card, sD card, pen drive, memory stick and other external USB storage disk devices.

[read more]

item.title: PC to Mobile Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: PC to Mobile Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryservices
item.itunes:summary:
PC to Mobile Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk text messages sending software broadcast unlimited text message campaign to any mobile number with a single click. Application provides a fast, secure and reliable communication environment with company staff and clients without need of other technical support. Bulk sms broadcasting software comes with new user interactive GUI interface send bulk of text messages by simply connect your mobile phone to PC via Microsoft ActiveSync (PC with XP operating system) and windows mobile device center (PC with Vista operating system). Tool provides facility to record number of contact number in a list that are you can be entered either manually or from phone book memory (SIM card) or from text files saved in computer or laptop system. Bulk mobile text message broadcasting program can send sms in many useful formats such as personalized SMS, job alerts, event alert and notifications, season greetings, promotional campaigns, contacting employees and several other occasional messages other mobile user. Software can easily run under all windows operating system including Windows 11, windows 10, windows 8, windows 7. Mass sms sending tool can send infinite text message in all over world including local and international network without internet connection.Features:*Group text messaging tool is a cost efficient and reliable sms sending software runs with all windows operating system including Windows Vista.*Bulk mobile text message broadcasting software sends sms for many purposes likes season greeting, job alert, invitation, personal sms etc.*Bulk sms sending service maintain a list of contact number stored either in phone book or save in computer or laptop hard disk.*Bulk sms broadcasting software can send unlimited text message to both local and international mobile phone without internet connection.

[read more]
